tips_en: Read the AutoResearchBench paper first, as it presents a benchmark for autonomous scientific‑literature discovery that defines the evaluation landscape for AI agents; this foundation is directly relevant to the multi‑agent organization work in the OMC paper. After understanding the benchmark, turn to OMC to see how an organization‑level design can be measured and improved using similar criteria. The RvR paper on image regeneration is comparatively isolated and can be saved for later.
tips_zh: 先读 AutoResearchBench 论文，因为它提出了用于评估 AI 科学家文献发现任务的基准，明确了 AI 智能体的评价框架；这一基准直接关联到 OMC 论文中对多智能体组织的度量。掌握基准后，可继续阅读 OMC 论文，了解如何从组织层面调度异构智能体完成任务，而图像再生方法的 RvR 论文与前两者关联较少，可稍后研读。
